creator: hatuka@nezumi.nu
text:
Several months ago, I posted update of devel/libthai.

However, the e-mail of current maintener is unreachable.

Version 0.1.5 is a bit old, uses smaller dictionary and seems
much or less unstable.  Update is deeply desired (at least by me!).

How can I do anything else to update devel/libthai port?

Thanks.

-- 
 --- nezumi
